monsters.name: Drakofido
monsters.condition_immunities: blinded, charmed, deafened, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned

traits.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
traits.desc: Incapacitated while in the area of an <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>antimagic field<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>. If targeted by <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Dispel Magic<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, must succeed on a CON saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.

traits.name: False Appearance
traits.desc: While motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal statue.

traits.name: Magical Construct
traits.desc: Immune to diseases and doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two attacks: one bite and one constrict, or 2 slam attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 +3 piercing damage plus 1d4 +0 fire damage.

actions.name: Constrict
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 1d6 +3 bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the Drakofido can't constrict another target.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d10 +3 bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) slashing damage.

actions.name: Hide
actions.desc: The guard hides as a bonus action if outnumbered.

traits.name: Low Morale
traits.desc: If reduced to 2 HP or less, the guard attempts to flee.

monsters.name: Peritas
monsters.damage_resistances: acid, cold, fire, lightning, thunder; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious
monsters.languages: understands all languages it knew in life but can't speak

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.desc: The specter can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.desc: While in sunlight, the specter has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

actions.name: Life Drain
actions.desc: Melee Spell Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

traits.name: Immovable
traits.desc: Advantage on saves against being moved

traits.name: Fragile
traits.desc: Takes extra 5 damage from thunder/force damage

traits.name: Stone Form
traits.desc: Resistance to piercing and slashing damage (from weapons)

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: `dice: 1d20+5` to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: `dice: 1d10+3` piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: `dice: 1d20+5` to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: `dice: 1d8+3` slashing damage.

actions.name: Pounce
actions.desc: Can move up to 20 ft. and attack as one action.
